name: Sanath
description: I build websites, mobile apps, APIs and dApps. I love puzzles, gaming, working out, photography and bouldering.

highlights: Built self-custodial wallets and multi-signature tools with Ledger and Trezor hardware wallet support.
Designed and deployed smart contracts on Ethereum based chains, one of them audited by Least Authority.
Co-built a mobile app used by 300+ schools across 4 countries to estimate ROI on solar investment.
Built solar design and analysis tools on top of Google Maps SDKs.
Built a fullstack ecommerce app for a luxury brand, including a drag and drop product viewer.
Built a management portal for inventory, users, and promotions across multiple stores.
Built internal financial management tools for a tier one bank.
Created a reusable React component library that improved developer experience across the team.

experienceSummary:
I'm a full stack developer with about 8 years of experience building web and mobile applications. For the last few years I've been freelancing, working mostly on blockchain products: wallets, multi-sig systems, DeFi apps, smart contracts, that kind of thing. One of the applications I built went through a full security audit by Least Authority and passed. I've handled everything from talking to clients and scoping out requirements to shipping and maintaining the final product.

Before going independent, I worked across a pretty wide range of domains. I helped build a solar analysis app used by hundreds of schools in multiple countries, built an e-commerce app for a luxury brand, worked on financial tools for a major bank at Wipro, and started my career building publishing platforms in Chennai. Along the way I've published npm libraries, contributed to open source, and built for everything from browsers to POS terminals.

These days I work mainly with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and PostgreSQL, with a soft spot for anything involving crypto.

projects.name: Common Spot
projects.description: Compare distance and duration of multiple routes at the same time
